steps.t: Nordach has sent you on to Ritherstad in search of Varbris. Ritherstad is in northern Pinnath Gelin.
Varbris has asked you to slap the rumps of his cows and shoo them away from the farm so that they might not fall prey to the goblins. You should slap …
You have slapped one cow rump, but there are yet more rumps that need slapping. You should slap more cow rumps at Ritherstad, in northern Pinnath Geli…
You have slapped two cow rumps, but there are yet more rumps that need slapping. You should slap more cow rumps at Ritherstad, in northern Pinnath Gel…
Your hand stings and you have stepped in something squishy and yet - there remain still more rumps that need slapping! You should slap more cow rumps …
You have slapped enough cow rumps to consider it a new profession of yours, but one rump yet remains unslapped! You should slap one more cow rump at R…
You have successfully driven off the cows of Ritherstad. You should let Varbris know his beloved girls are safe from goblins for the moment. Varbris i…
